grove_hcho_init.message0: Initialize HCHO sensor %1 pin %2 R0 calibration value %3
grove_hcho_init.tooltip: Initialize the HCHO sensor, set pins and R0 calibration values. R0 needs to be pre-calibrated in clean air.

grove_hcho_read_rs.message0: Read HCHO %1 sensor resistance value Rs

grove_hcho_calibrate_r0.tooltip: Calibrate the sensor in clean air and return the R0 value. Fill this value into the R0 parameter of the initialization block.
